languages.text: "Я подозревала... Но {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Бог-Император{/g} мне свидетель, все еще надеюсь, вы ошибаетесь. Показывайте дорогу". {n}Голос Ларии звучит глухо, словно это ее ведут на эшафот.{/n}
languages.translation_comment:
Телепортируем нас на сцену и начинается DL_JuvennaVox_dialogue
стартуем DL_OncePerLoop_LariaFirstTalk

languages.text: "I had my suspicions, but... {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g} as my witness, I still hope you are wrong. Lead the way," {n}she says in a lifeless tone, as if she were the one being led to the gallows.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Я подозревала... Но {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Бог-Император{/g} мне свидетель, все еще надеюсь, вы ошибаетесь. Показывайте дорогу". {n}Голос Ларии звучит глухо, словно это ее ведут на эшафот.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "I had my suspicions, but... {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g} as my witness, I still hope you are wrong. Lead the way," {n}she says in a lifeless tone, as if she were the one being led to the gallows.{/n}

"I had my suspicions, but... {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g} as my witness, I still hope you are wrong. Lead the way," {n}she says in a lifeless tone, as if she were the one being led to the gallows.{/n}

"I had my suspicions, but... {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g} as my witness, I still hope you are wrong. Lead the way," {n}she says in a lifeless tone, as if she were the one being led to the gallows.{/n}

languages.text: “我之前就有所怀疑，不过……{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}神皇{/g}为证，我还是希望你弄错了。带路吧。”{n}她死气沉沉地说，仿佛她自己才是那个要上绞刑架的人。{/n}
languages.original_text: "I had my suspicions, but... {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g} as my witness, I still hope you are wrong. Lead the way," {n}she says in a lifeless tone, as if she were the one being led to the gallows.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “我之前就有所怀疑，不过……{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}神皇{/g}为证，我还是希望你弄错了。带路吧。”{n}她死气沉沉地说，仿佛她自己才是那个要上绞刑架的人。{/n}

languages.text: « J'ai des soupçons depuis quelque temps déjà, mais... L'{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Empereur-Dieu{/g} m'en est témoin, je garde espoir que vous vous trompiez. À vous l'honneur, » {n}dit-elle d'une voix atone, comme si c'était elle que l'on conduisait à l'échafaud.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I had my suspicions, but... {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g} as my witness, I still hope you are wrong. Lead the way," {n}she says in a lifeless tone, as if she were the one being led to the gallows.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « J'ai des soupçons depuis quelque temps déjà, mais... L'{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Empereur-Dieu{/g} m'en est témoin, je garde espoir que vous vous trompiez. À vous l'honneur, » {n}dit-elle d'une voix atone, comme si c'était elle que l'on conduisait à l'échafaud.{/n}

languages.text: "Şüphelerim vardı ama... {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Tanrı İmparator{/g} şahidim olsun ki umarım yanılıyorsunuzdur. Önden buyurun." {n}Laria, cansız bir ses tonuyla konuşuyor. Sanki darağacına doğru son yolculuğuna çıkıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I had my suspicions, but... {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g} as my witness, I still hope you are wrong. Lead the way," {n}she says in a lifeless tone, as if she were the one being led to the gallows.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Şüphelerim vardı ama... {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Tanrı İmparator{/g} şahidim olsun ki umarım yanılıyorsunuzdur. Önden buyurun." {n}Laria, cansız bir ses tonuyla konuşuyor. Sanki darağacına doğru son yolculuğuna çıkıyor.{/n}

languages.text: «Tenía mis sospechas, pero... que el {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Dios Emperador{/g} me oiga, sigo esperando que se equivoque. Guíeme». {n}Habla con un tono apagado, como si la llevaran al patíbulo.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I had my suspicions, but... {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g} as my witness, I still hope you are wrong. Lead the way," {n}she says in a lifeless tone, as if she were the one being led to the gallows.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Tenía mis sospechas, pero... que el {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Dios Emperador{/g} me oiga, sigo esperando que se equivoque. Guíeme». {n}Habla con un tono apagado, como si la llevaran al patíbulo.{/n}

languages.text: "Ich hatte einen Verdacht, aber ... Der {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Gottimperator{/g} sei mein Zeuge, ich hoffe noch immer, Ihr irrt Euch. Geht voraus", {n}sagt sie mit lebloser Stimme, als wäre sie es, die zum Galgen geführt wird.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I had my suspicions, but... {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g} as my witness, I still hope you are wrong. Lead the way," {n}she says in a lifeless tone, as if she were the one being led to the gallows.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Ich hatte einen Verdacht, aber ... Der {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Gottimperator{/g} sei mein Zeuge, ich hoffe noch immer, Ihr irrt Euch. Geht voraus", {n}sagt sie mit lebloser Stimme, als wäre sie es, die zum Galgen geführt wird.{/n}

languages.text: 「疑念はあったが…{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}神皇帝{/g}に誓う、私はまだ貴方の誤りだと信じたい。先を行け」{n}彼女は死刑台に連れて行かれるかのような無気力な声で言った。{/n}
languages.original_text: "I had my suspicions, but... {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g} as my witness, I still hope you are wrong. Lead the way," {n}she says in a lifeless tone, as if she were the one being led to the gallows.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「疑念はあったが…{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}神皇帝{/g}に誓う、私はまだ貴方の誤りだと信じたい。先を行け」{n}彼女は死刑台に連れて行かれるかのような無気力な声で言った。{/n}
